_comment: Hooks live in .claude/settings.local.json (per-machine, gitignored). install.sh writes it with absolute paths to scripts/metasphere-context and scripts/metasphere-posthook for this machine's checkout. The committed settings.json must NOT contain hardcoded paths — they don't work cross-machine and claude-code merges both files, so a wrong path here causes a duplicate hook + error every turn.
